summary: Manual browser smoke passed for the first weapon selector/fire loop after fixing the missing shared GLB texture.
observations: Local browser smoke used an 844 x 390 landscape viewport.
Debug API reported all three weapon asset IDs loaded with no assetLoadErrors.
VAULT selector click updated active weapon state and HUD label.
Fire button click changed VAULT ammo from 12 to 11 and incremented shotCount to 1.
Shared texture public URL returned 200 with image/png.
decisions: Keep manual browser smoke for this slice.
Automate smoke once browser test harness work starts.
Full playthrough QA remains a separate gate.
caughtIssues: Dev-browser FPS hovered around 57 during smoke rather than a locked 60.
risks: Without automated browser smoke, future asset 404 regressions can still reach manual QA.
FPS should be checked in production preview before heavier asset imports.
